## Checklist

- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes
- [ ] `uv run mypy niceview/ --ignore-missing-imports` is clean
- [ ] `uv run ruff check` is clean
- [ ] Docs updated (README / `docs/`) if behavior changed
- [ ] `docs/CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` for any user-facing / API change
- [ ] Existing acceptance tests were not changed without prior discussion
